id.description: Unique identifier for the write event

parent_id.description: Causal parent event ID, if applicable

logical_time.description: Sequential or Lamport timestamp from the writer

wall_time.description: Unix timestamp in nanoseconds from user space

write_state.description: The user-space intent state of the write

survival_state.description: The post-crash empirically verified survival status

artifact_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the artifact file containing this event to ensure reproducible deterministic replay
